body:
## Rationale

MetalForge currently has **only 4 genre gear guides** (`/guides/best-[gear]-for-[genre]`):
1. best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal
2. best-drum-heads-for-metal
3. best-cymbals-for-metal
4. best-snare-drums-for-thrash-metal

These pages generate **commercial-intent traffic** — users searching "best cymbals for death metal" are ready to buy or compare. **None of these new guides are in any of the 200 open seo-proposals.**

New guides to add (confirmed absent from genreGearGuides.js and all proposals):
1. `best-cymbals-for-death-metal` — anchored by George Kollias (Zildjian K), Flo Mounier (Paiste 2002), Pete Sandoval
2. `best-drum-pedals-for-black-metal` — anchored by Inferno (Pearl Eliminator), Hellhammer (Pearl P-2052C), Frost
3. `best-drum-kits-for-thrash-metal` — anchored by Lars Ulrich (Tama Starclassic), Dave Lombardo, Gene Hoglan (DW)

## Impact

- "Best cymbals for death metal" / "best drum pedals for black metal" = high commercial intent keywords
- Each guide creates a unique URL with schema and internal links to drummer profile pages
- 3 GA4/GSC active entities per guide = strong relevance signals
- Current guides (e.g., best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal) presumably generating clicks — expanding the suite multiplies coverage
- LLM citation surface: "What cymbals do death metal drummers use?" — structured guide = citable answer

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` — add 3 new entries
- `/public/llms/guides/best-cymbals-for-death-metal.md` (+ other 2) — LLM files

## Content template shape (per guide)

```js
'best-cymbals-for-death-metal': {
  slug: 'best-cymbals-for-death-metal',
  category: 'genre-guide',
  gearType: 'cymbals',
  genre: 'death-metal',
  title: 'Best Cymbals for Death Metal: 2026 Ultimate Guide',
  metaTitle: 'Best Cymbals for Death Metal 2026 | MetalForge Expert Guide',
  description: 'Top cymbal picks for death metal: what George Kollias, Flo Mounier, and Pete Sandoval actually use, from budget to pro.',
  featuredDrummers: [
    { slug: 'george-kollias', name: 'George Kollias', reason: 'Zildjian K for extreme cutting power' },
    { slug: 'flo-mounier', name: 'Flo Mounier', reason: 'Paiste 2002 — controlled chaos at 270 BPM' },
    { slug: 'pete-sandoval', name: 'Pete Sandoval', reason: 'Zildjian for hyper-blast articulation' },
  ],
  // Budget / mid-range / pro tier recommendations
}
```

## Quality gate (per guide)

- ≥400 words covering gear rationale, drummer examples, budget/mid/pro tiers
- ≥3 internal links to drummer profiles
- Schema: FAQPage with ≥3 Q&A per guide
- LLM file at `/public/llms/guides/[slug].md` ≥200 words

## Estimated organic uplift

"Best cymbals for [genre]" keyword cluster: estimated 300-1000 monthly searches each. Commercial intent = higher engagement rate. Complements existing death/black/thrash album article clusters with gear-purchase intent layer.

GSC query bucket: fills the commercial-intent gap in our content mix (currently dominated by informational album setup articles).

## Verify

1. 3 new entries present in genreGearGuides.js
2. Pages render at `/guides/best-cymbals-for-death-metal`, `/guides/best-drum-pedals-for-black-metal`, `/guides/best-drum-kits-for-thrash-metal`
3. FAQPage schema validates for each
4. Internal links to featured drummer profiles resolve correctly
5. 3 LLM files at `/public/llms/guides/[slug].md` exist

## Done

All 3 guides live with FAQPage schema and LLM files. genreGearGuides.js has 7 entries total (up from 4).
title: SEO batch: Genre Gear Guides expansion — best-cymbals-for-death-metal + best-drum-pedals-for-black-metal + best-drum-kits-for-thrash-metal (~3 guides)
